steps.title: Use the review contrast
steps.content: Moreno found the 2016 version's storytelling very confusing but enthusiastically praised the storytelling in the 2019 Broadway version. The contrast shows that his view of the musical changed positively between the two productions.

steps.title: Reject opposite readings
steps.content: Choice B says the 2019 production should have been larger, which Moreno does not claim. Choice C says the 2019 version was less enjoyable, contradicting his praise. Choice D says the 2016 version had fewer problems, reversing the passage. The implied view is that the musical improved greatly. The answer is A.
